articles/wagmi-ethers.title: WAGMI vs Ethers.js: Choosing the Right Ethereum Development Library
articles/wagmi-ethers.description: Compare WAGMI and Ethers.js for Ethereum development. Learn the pros and cons of each library, recent changes in WAGMI v2, and how to choose the best tool for your web3 project.

articles/structuredClone.title: Deep Cloning in JavaScript: Mastering `structuredClone()`
articles/structuredClone.description: Learn how to properly create deep copies of complex objects in JavaScript using the modern structuredClone() method, understand its advantages over traditional techniques, and discover when and how to use it effectively.

articles/state-optimization-guide.title: State Optimization Mastery: From Vanilla JavaScript to Advanced Framework Techniques
articles/state-optimization-guide.description: Master app state optimization with comprehensive analysis of data structures, Big O complexity, and advanced techniques using Zustand, Redux, and performance patterns.

articles/saga-fetch.title: saga-fetch: Streamline API Calls in Redux Saga Applications
articles/saga-fetch.description: Learn how to simplify AJAX requests in Redux Saga with saga-fetch. Handle loading states, success/error responses, and request cancellation with minimal boilerplate code.

articles/react-vs-jquery.title: React vs jQuery 2025 React or jQuery? Difference, Performance, Security & Which to Choose
articles/react-vs-jquery.description: React vs jQuery (aka React or jQuery) 2025: A Complete Guide for Developers & CTOs. Compare performance, security, job-market demand and business ROI. Discover why 68 % of Fortune 500 companies pick React.

articles/production-AI-in-2016-year.title: AI in 2016: The First Time I Worked on a Project That Using Machine Learning
articles/production-AI-in-2016-year.description: A personal reflection on working with AI in 2016, before the LLM revolution. Exploring how AI has evolved from specialized applications to becoming accessible to everyone through user-friendly interfaces.

articles/porto-passwordless-blockchain-a.title: Porto: Developer-First Toolkit for Passwordless Blockchain Access
articles/porto-passwordless-blockchain-a.description: Porto is the open-source, developer-first toolkit for passwordless blockchain access. Build dApps with secure passkey authentication, gas sponsorship, account abstraction (EIP-7702), programmable wallets, and cross-chain DeFi—all with a blazing-fast TypeScript/Wagmi SDK. Unlock seamless Web3 onboarding for users, boost conversion, and get production-ready crypto payments & automation in minutes.

articles/node.js-multi-core-cluster.title: Unlocking Node.js Performance: Harnessing Multi-Core Power with the cluster Module
articles/node.js-multi-core-cluster.description: Learn how to effectively utilize all CPU cores in your Node.js applications using the built-in cluster module, improve performance and resilience, and understand when this approach is preferable to other scaling solutions.

articles/memoization.title: Mastering React Performance: memo, useMemo, and useCallback Deep Dive
articles/memoization.description: Unlock peak performance in your React applications. Learn how to effectively use React.memo, useMemo, and useCallback for optimal rendering and maintainable code.

articles/javascript-lexical-scope.title: Understanding JavaScript Lexical Scope: The Foundation of Modern JavaScript
articles/javascript-lexical-scope.description: A comprehensive guide to JavaScript lexical scope, including closures, hoisting, and best practices for writing maintainable code.

articles/higher-order-functions-and-curr.title: JavaScript Higher-Order Functions, Currying & Arrow Functions
articles/higher-order-functions-and-curr.description: Master JavaScript's powerful functional programming features with this comprehensive guide to higher-order functions, currying techniques, and arrow functions. Learn with practical examples and best practices.

articles/global-diff.title: diff-browser-globals: Track Global Window Object Changes in Web Apps
articles/global-diff.description: Discover what's being added to your browser's global scope with diff-browser-globals. A lightweight tool to identify and debug unexpected global variables in your web applications.

articles/function-declaration-vs-express.title: JavaScript Function Declarations vs Expressions Key Differences Explained
articles/function-declaration-vs-express.description: Learn the critical differences between JavaScript function declarations and expressions, understand hoisting behavior, and discover when to use each approach for cleaner, more effective code.

articles/floating-point-precision.title: Floating-Point Precision: Why 0.1 + 0.2 Isn't 0.3
articles/floating-point-precision.description: Explore the surprising result of 0.1 + 0.2 in programming and understand why it happens due to floating-point representation and the IEEE 754 standard.

articles/extend-routines.title: extend-routines: Enhanced Redux Action Management for Async Operations
articles/extend-routines.description: Learn how to streamline Redux async workflows with extend-routines. Create custom action routines, handle complex async states, and reduce boilerplate in Redux applications.

articles/ethereum-whitepaper-explanation.title: Ethereum Whitepaper Explanation. What is Ethereum? Complete Beginner's Guide to Ethereum Explained Simply
articles/ethereum-whitepaper-explanation.description: Learn what Ethereum is and how it works with our simple guide. Understand smart contracts, cryptocurrency, and how Ethereum is different from Bitcoin. Perfect for beginners.

articles/ethereum-abi.title: Ethereum ABI Complete Guide: Application Binary Interface for Smart Contracts  and dApp Development in 2025
articles/ethereum-abi.description: Master Ethereum ABI (Application Binary Interface) for smart contract interaction.  Learn ABI encoding, decoding, function calls, events, and best practices for  EVM-compatible chains. Complete guide with examples.

articles/drop-react-manual-memoization.title: Drop React Manual Memoization | The Mutability & Aliasing Model in React
articles/drop-react-manual-memoization.description: Deep dive into the new mutability & aliasing model powering React Compiler (June 2025) and how it eliminates most manual memoization.

articles/design.title: Software Design Principles: A Practical Guide to Better Code
articles/design.description: Learn essential software design principles for building maintainable code. Discover practical approaches to software architecture, from small projects to enterprise systems, based on real-world experience.

articles/curiosity-js.title: Weird JavaScript Quirks Explained: Type Coercion, Equality & More
articles/curiosity-js.description: Discover the most surprising JavaScript quirks and learn how type coercion, loose equality, and parsing rules lead to unexpected behaviors in your code.

articles/contributions-to-major-web-dev-.title: Contributing to Web Development Documentation and core engine: My Journey with MDN and web.dev
articles/contributions-to-major-web-dev-.description: Yuri Shapkarin contributions to major web development documentation platforms, including Mozilla's MDN (+it's engine) and Google's web.dev, highlighting the impact of small contributions in the open-source community.

articles/byzantine-fault-tolerance.title: What is Byzantine Fault Tolerance? Complete BFT Guide for Bitcoin, Ethereum & Blockchain Security 2025
articles/byzantine-fault-tolerance.description: Learn Byzantine Fault Tolerance (BFT) explained simply: how Bitcoin, Ethereum & blockchain networks prevent attacks from malicious nodes. Complete guide with examples, pBFT algorithms, and real-world implementations for developers and crypto enthusiasts.

articles/async-event-loop-web-workers.title: Event Loop, Threads, and Web Workers. Asynchronous JavaScript.
articles/async-event-loop-web-workers.description: Dive deep into asynchronous JavaScript, understand the event loop, how JavaScript handles concurrency, and leverage Web Workers for true parallelism in your web applications.

articles/_back-health-and-therapeutic-ex.title: Back Health for Software Developers: Therapeutic Exercises for Core Strength
articles/_back-health-and-therapeutic-ex.description: Learn essential therapeutic exercises and principles to maintain back health as a software developer, including bodyweight exercises, resistance band workouts, and office-specific movements to counteract the effects of prolonged sitting.

articles/WAGMI-basics.title: WAGMI Library Tutorial: Complete Guide to Building dApps with WAGMI and VIEM in 2025
articles/WAGMI-basics.description: Master WAGMI library for React dApp development. Learn WAGMI hooks, VIEM integration, multichain support, and best practices with practical examples. Complete WAGMI tutorial for beginners to advanced developers.

articles/LavaMoat-against-JS-supply-chai.title: LavaMoat: Protecting JavaScript from Supply Chain Attacks
articles/LavaMoat-against-JS-supply-chai.description: Explore LavaMoat, an open-source toolset designed to secure JavaScript applications against supply chain attacks by compartmentalizing dependencies and controlling access during installation, build, and runtime.
